title: Smoky British Beef Bowl
description: A quick, smoky beef bowl that delivers tender, braised flavour with the richness of ghee and a touch of British charm.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp ghee in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and sear for 2-3 minutes until browned, then remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining ghee, diced onion and crushed garlic; cook until onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Return the beef to the pan, sprinkle with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to coat.
Pour in beef stock and Worcestershire sauce, bring to a gentle simmer, cover, and let braise for 10-12 minutes until the beef is tender.
Add cherry tomato halves and cook for an additional 3 minutes until tomatoes are warmed through.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot over a bed of fresh lettuce or enjoy as is for a raw-friendly option.
